title: Simplistic 3D Doors
description: 3D Doors and Trapdoors in a vanilla style
body:
# Simplistic 3D Doors
This pack makes doors and trapdoors of all varients 3D as well as fixing/improving the UV's of both
## Before 
![Door Front Before](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f167c2e43dd9ee6194d9c64842ab9437ec694493.png)
![Door Sides Before](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2380ce86c61c025e5bbd54bdb9bcf7a9249263ff.png)
![Trapdoor Front Before](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d33d489a07253e68465f562cfa9c1662745fe997.png)
![Trapdoor Sides Before](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/edaa4299f6ab230400be7430c18508a81565f414.png)
## After
![Door Front After](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0de94bf716c589131dc4cadc883d33bbdc8bb441.png)
![Door Sides After](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f8c40cb9ed0c8fd8c6745ff2bbffd86630902cc5.png)
